title: Working with Multiple Windows
description: Learn to manage multiple windows — resize, arrange, and switch between them.

steps.hint: Click the Finder icon (📁) in the Dock.
Click the TextEdit icon (📝) in the Dock.

steps.instruction: Open Terminal from the Dock. Now you have 3 windows open!
steps.hint: Click the Terminal icon (⬛) in the Dock.

steps.instruction: Click on the Finder window to bring it to the front. Clicking on a window focuses it.
steps.hint: Find the Finder window behind the other windows and click on any visible part of it.

steps.instruction: Try dragging a window by its title bar to reposition it. Move any window to a different spot.
steps.hint: Click and hold on the title bar (the gray bar at the top) of any window, then drag it to move it.

steps.instruction: Minimize a window by clicking the yellow traffic light button (●). It will shrink to the Dock.
steps.hint: Click the yellow circle button in the top-left corner of any window.
